# The Precious Moment Residences — Hua Hin, Thailand

Two distinct residences in Hua Hin offering unhurried coastal living minutes from the sea.
Website: https://www.thepreciousmoment.com/
Price Tier: ฿฿ - Moderate (Inquire directly via chat for exact seasonal quotes and real-time availability)

## 1. The Precious (Monthly Residences — Open Now)
- **Overview:** An exclusive monthly residence building spanning 7 floors with 79 rooms.
- **Target Guests:** Expats, digital nomads, retirees, and long-stay guests seeking a peaceful, residential atmosphere.
- **Room Types:** Standard Studio (balcony, private bath, air conditioning), Deluxe Room (spacious layout for extended living), and top-floor suites.
- **Link:** https://www.thepreciousmoment.com/#precious

## 2. The Moment (Monthly & Daily Stays — Opening Mid-2027)
- **Overview:** A flexible 7-floor residence offering both monthly leases and daily/weekend holiday accommodations. Opens mid-2027; reservations and enquiries welcome ahead of opening.
- **Target Guests:** International visitors, retirees, and Bangkok weekend/holiday getaways.
- **Room Types:** Standard Monthly, Superior Monthly, Deluxe Monthly, plus daily Standard and Deluxe studios on top floors.
- **Link:** https://www.thepreciousmoment.com/#moment

## Location & Nearby
- **Location:** Central Hua Hin, Prachuap Khiri Khan, Thailand (minutes from Hua Hin Beach).
- **Nearby:** 7-Eleven approx 82 m; Hua Hin Railway Station approx 1.6 km; Hua Hin Night Market approx 2.2 km.
- **On-site:** Two swimming pools (one per property), fitness room, on-site car park.

## Reservations & Contact
- No online booking forms or reservation fees. All inquiries, rate quotes, and reservations are handled personally via chat:
  - LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/~the.precious
  - Facebook Messenger: https://m.me/precious.huahin
  - Phone: +66 94 567 4488, +66 94 249 1188
